reviews.name: places/ChIJ6aHt062f9YgRfDMkT_DZW9E/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWV05HVk1RbWQ0VlhZM1VGWmhNV2xETFVGUVdXYxAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Bindu is truly one of the best primary care physicians I’ve ever had. She takes a holistic approach to healthcare, focusing on identifying and addressing the root cause of issues rather than just treating symptoms. She goes the extra mile to ensure every concern is thoroughly investigated and explained.

I deeply appreciate how she educates her patients, helping us understand our health, preventive measures, and long-term wellness strategies. Her attention to detail, combined with genuine care, makes every visit reassuring and productive. Her staff is professional, friendly, and attentive, making every interaction smooth and comfortable.

If you are looking for a primary care physician who listens, educates, and provides comprehensive, root-cause-focused care, Dr. Bindu is exceptional.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6aHt062f9YgRfDMkT_DZW9E/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toVVRqQnROakZrZFRkUmVtcHJabk5zTkZSSFMwRRAB
reviews.text:
Very good experience
The staff treated me with great care and professionalism. From the doctors to the nurses, everyone was kind, attentive, and supportive throughout my visit. I’m truly grateful for the excellent service and would highly recommend this hospital to others. Thank you!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6aHt062f9YgRfDMkT_DZW9E/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25OdU9WaElMVkpUUkhaM1dFUXpielI2Y3pGS1YzYxAB
reviews.text:
I was going to wait to do this review but the more I reflect on my appointment the more enraged I become. I have been riddled with health issues for years and wanted her to help me find the root as well as give me her advice on recent findings from other doctors.

The first thing she said to me when she came into the room and I asked how she was doing, was "I am tired of taking on other people's problems." I figured she was joking but the rest of the appointment showed she was not.

She was completely enraged by the fact that I brought in medical information from other doctors. To say she disagreed was an understatement. Which is fine. I welcome all opinions. But her behavior? Dismissiveness, belittling nature??? It was the most unprofessional behavior I've ever encountered. And I've seen a lot of doctors through the years. I'm used to being dismissed. I'm just truly still in shock by how my appointment went. I recommend she takes some time off and re-evaluates if working with other people's problems is what she truly wants to do. Because those were her words not mine.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6aHt062f9YgRfDMkT_DZW9E/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUN3X1lmX0tnEAE
reviews.text: Dr. Bindu Alexander is truly a blessing for my family and me. She genuinely cares about her patients, taking the time to listen, ask the right questions, and explain everything thoroughly. Every visit feels welcoming, and you always leave knowing you're in good hands. Thank you, Dr. A, for your dedication and exceptional care!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6aHt062f9YgRfDMkT_DZW9E/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2twd2JUVmFRalF5UzBGVVRqaG1VbWt6YkVOVU1rRRAB
reviews.text:
I am skeptical of the conventional medical establishment due to drs in the past who were not curious. Just had their Rx pad handy while barely listening. If you've felt like that and want something better - Dr. Alexander and her team are it. I am an avid researcher of natural solutions and while I take a number of supplements, Dr. A did not make me feel stupid or less than when talking with me (not *to* me) about what is going on. Many drs. will try and put non-drs in "their place" as if they are the smartest people in every room... but not Dr. A.
I am appreciative that she takes insurance, I know it is a hassle, but greatly appreciate it. I had some unique circumstances and asks, and she was great. Also, if you are a woman and do not want the standard mammogram process as it is terrible - she will listen. I was waiting for push back and degrading lecturing (as many drs have been like this) and she was not. She understood and said she'd be happy to order a sonogram instead. I look forward to my follow-up appt.

reviews.name: places/ChIJSYf4bme99YgR3bbwlQ4dNTA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t0UFprVldkVEpSVTBSeVZWWk1ka3BoZG1GaE5WRRAB
reviews.text: 5 months ago I was 360 pounds, inflamed, nearly pre-diabetic, exhausted, and completely disconnected from my body. At 59, I felt stuck. Dr. Tru at Conscious Medicine in Alpharetta evaluated me and told me everything stemmed from my gut—and she was right. I committed to her gut restoration program, trusted the process, and in just four months I’ve lost 67 pounds naturally through targeted testing, biofeedback, supplements, cleanses, nutrition guidance, and holistic support. Bao Phan has been incredible on the data and technical side—monitoring bio-metrics, coordinating supplements, and staying closely involved every step of the way. The facility is immaculate, high-tech, and welcoming, and their bedside manner is compassionate and empowering. I didn’t just lose weight—I gained awareness, discipline, knowledge, and a new relationship with my body. I’m now on track to lose 120 pounds total and feel better than I have in years. This has been a true five-star experience, and I highly recommend Conscious Medicine to anyone serious about restoring their health. — Mil Cannon

reviews.name: places/ChIJSYf4bme99YgR3bbwlQ4dNTA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT214ME9WZFFjRzlLZW1STk4xWlVPR3RvVjI5Sk4yYxAB
reviews.text:
I don’t usually write reviews, but I felt like this one was worth it. I had been going in circles with different doctors and never really got clear answers.

Came across Conscious Medicine and decided to give it a shot, and honestly, it’s been a completely different experience. Dr. Truc actually listens and doesn’t rush you out the door. She asks a lot of questions and really tries to understand what’s going on instead of just prescribing something quickly.

It feels more like they’re trying to fix the actual problem rather than just manage symptoms. Still early in my journey, but I already feel like I’m finally on the right track.

If you’re around Atlanta and frustrated with the usual healthcare system, I’d say it’s definitely worth checking them out.

reviews.name: places/ChIJSYf4bme99YgR3bbwlQ4dNTA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tsMU1rNWpWWEJIWVhWdlkzaGFjMm8xWkU1dWJuYxAB
reviews.text:
I am not someone who typically leaves reviews, which is why this one matters—my experience with Dr. Truc  has been truly extraordinary and life-changing.
Before seeing her, I was told my labs would likely never return to normal and that I should focus on just not getting worse.  I had thyroid issues, non alcoholic fatty liver issues, chronic Urinary tract infections.   After years of chemical exposure in my profession, my body was in terrible condition, my symptoms were overwhelming, and my labs were all over the place.
Dr. Truc listened to every detail of my story and treated me as a whole person—not just a list of symptoms. Her approach is incredibly unique; rather than focusing on one area, she is deeply in tune with the body as a whole. She created a detailed and customized plan based on that full understanding, and within just a few months, my symptoms were completely reversed and my labs returned to normal—something I was told would never happen.
She is not only exceptionally knowledgeable, but also deeply compassionate, intuitive, and genuinely invested in her patients. Her staff reflects that same level of care, professionalism, and kindness, which makes the entire experience even more meaningful.  They combine the most advanced medical knowledge and technology with a holistic understanding of the body, creating care that feels both cutting-edge and deeply personal.
I can honestly say that I have complete trust and confidence in her and her team—I no longer worry about my care because I know I am in the best possible hands. She is truly one of a kind, and I am incredibly grateful to be under her care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJSYf4bme99YgR3bbwlQ4dNTA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tkTVEzVmZUbWswTTFvdE1teEdYMDlNTmtWemVXYxAB
reviews.text:
I’ve taken many months before posting this so it comes from reflection, not emotion. I became a patient of Dr. Tru at Conscious Medicine starting in June 2024 after being diagnosed with liver cirrhosis at age 27. While some symptoms like fatigue and headaches improved temporarily during treatment, follow-up imaging showed no change in liver scarring, and symptoms quickly returned after stopping supplements in June 2025.

I also had ethical concerns about how my case was presented professionally without clear confirmation of imaging changes and her claims of healing cirrhosis based on symptom improvement while I was still on the protocol. Ultimately, I spent about $15k for short-term symptom relief without lasting resolution, and there was no due diligence on her end in confirming whether the cirrhosis was actually reversed. Liver doctors have since confirmed scans remain the same. This alone is a massive ethical consideration. Nobody should expect physicians to reverse something as complex as cirrhosis, but patients do deserve honest, transparent communication grounded in ethical responsibility and medical moral code. If there was uncertainty about interpreting imaging, I believe consultation with appropriate specialists would have been the most responsible approach.

This isn’t meant to harm anyone, but to encourage prospective patients to thoroughly research, ask questions, and make fully informed decisions about their care. You deserve that before spending massive amounts of money with whoever you choose to work with.

I give this a 2-star rating because the supplements did help with symptoms. However, a 1-star would be more appropriate given the lack of proper medical oversight and transparency.

reviews.name: places/ChIJSYf4bme99YgR3bbwlQ4dNTA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pFemNXVlViSGxUV1dwdGNGWjFOMmt5VWxOU2JIYxAB
reviews.text: I am so lucky to have met Dr. Tru.  She is so kind, loving and considerate.  This is exactly what is missing in the medical community these days!  She listens and she actually cares about my health and creating a lifestyle that works for me.   I am very grateful that such an intelligent potential dr. switched camps and came to functional medicine!  I look forward to our next appointment and my improved health :)

I remain hopeful that our healthcare system will soon see the value in functional medicine and provide Insurance support for it.
I highly recommend Dr. Doniparthi and his staff. I have already referred fellow physicians with medical issues to him.

reviews.name: places/ChIJa0C3yUnM-YgRplh_bPRycHE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25CU2MzVmxjalpDYVZSalNXcDNRM1ZTWkcxT1NuYxAB
reviews.text:
I’ve been coming here for three years now. I am very happy with the care I get, the attentiveness and the ease of making appts.  I read the review that complained it took too long to get an appt.  The practice is popular and it does take a while to get in as a new patient. My first appt was 53 weeks in advance. Yes - a year and a week. 😱😱
Go ahead and accept it then ask to get on a cancellation list. They called me in after 5 months and I’ve been here since. Dr Anthony has a stellar rep and I really wanted to get in his practice.
With their guidance and medications I took my A1c from 8-9 to 5.6 my last test a couple weeks ago. I’ve lost about 30lbs and feel better than I have in a long time.  They offered me an appt for dietary guidance and it was very helpful.  I had been diagnosed 18 years by then but I learned some good info in that class.
I’ve never had any difficulty with any staff; they’ve all been as sweet as pie. Once I didn’t have the right amount to pay my bill (self pay) and they let me run down to the kwickie mart and buy a snack to get change.  I told them I liked it there and sure wasn’t going to run off and lose my place in the practice for $90. No way!!
If you are looking for an endocrinologist don’t hesitate to visit Endocrinology of Athens. I’m very satisfied with the care I get.

reviews.text: Dr Anthony is the most positive, caring & attentive male Doctor I've every had. What a blessing he is to me & the medical profession! He is the real deal. His listening skills are exceptional. I have full confidence in him& his skills. His staff is consistently friendly & caring. I'm so happy I'm a patient of Dr. Anthony's & I Highly recommend.

reviews.text:
Dr Cotton was extremely thorough and did a great job of explaining why I was referred and her recommended course of care.

She listened carefully to my concerns and answered all of my questions in easy to understand language.

I felt she genuinely cared for me as her patient and took full ownership of my care. She followed up with me overnight through MyChart to share lab results and allay any concerns I might have had.

I wish all of my doctors were that attentive.

Dr Cotten was immediately comforting, and made me feel as though she truly cared about me and my health. She was incredibly professional,  knowledgeable and compassionate. She inspired great confidence, and I have no doubt that my health struggles will be resolved with her help.
I highly recommend her.

reviews.text:
I’ve been coming to Ageless for about a year and a half now. Great results and everyone is so amazing. Never felt pressured to increase dosage, it was always on my terms and how I felt.
If you’re looking in the Buckhead area I highly recommend coming in and having a conversation.

reviews.text: This is the absolute BEST clinic in the country. I have visited many and the people here really care about your health and progress. I recommend to All of my friends.

reviews.name: places/ChIJeV5LjIwF9YgRAIkVeJHYrdY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xjMllXcEVOM2d3U1VaUFRHNDNiM0pyVjNSdWVFRRAB
reviews.text:
I’ll admit, I was skeptical at first. Ageless Men’s Health was all over my social media, and I wasn’t sure if it was just hype. But deep down, I knew something had to change. For a while I had been dealing with constant tiredness, never feeling fully rested, brain fog, and a lack of drive. At 49, I chalked it up to age, but I also knew there had to be a solution.

Getting my bloodwork done to check my testosterone levels was the best decision I could’ve made to move me in the direction I was needing. From the moment I met with Johnathan for my 30–40 minute consultation, my anxiety went away little by little. He took the time to answer every single one of my questions (and I had a lot!). He explained the process clearly from start to finish, without ever making me feel pressured to join.

What really stood out was seeing other clients confidently walking in and out for their weekly T-shots. That reassurance, combined with the professionalism I received, made my decision easy. I signed up yesterday and I’m so glad I did. Should be receiving my results by tomorrow.

If you’re on the fence like I was, I highly recommend giving Ageless Men’s Health a chance. They’ve helped me take real steps toward optimizing my health and energy.

Mr. Marcus Hanslip

reviews.text: I was dragging for months then finally walked into the Peachtree office and they got me in fast and ecplained the plan in simple words and a couple weeks later i had real energy again. Staff felt kind and on it the place was clean and the whole thing was easier than I thought

reviews.name: places/ChIJlQkolCcJ9YgRSXnEmiHIbAo/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURJcDc3UUNREAE
reviews.text: Despite the name, Atlanta Men’s Clinic doesn’t just treat men! I came here to receive stem cell injections after finding out that I had liver cirrhosis at the age of 28 and wanted an option other than liver transplant down the road. Clarissa took great care of me as she does so well and a few months in, my liver scans looked much better! There is more healing to do, but hepatology told me there was no cure and Atlanta Men’s Clinic uses high quality stem cells that very clearly regenerate tissue, per obvious scans. I highly recommend for complicated conditions and for pain management. Also, they have 2 locations which are both great.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlQkolCcJ9YgRSXnEmiHIbAo/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ3eTd5MkF3EAE
reviews.text: I have had a really good experience at Atlanta Men’s Clinic. I went in for a consultation and found they had a lot of knowledge on my issues and a really great staff. I received a state of the art P Shot with Stem Cells from them, and have been happy with my results. I haven’t found anywhere else in Atlanta that has these kind of cutting edge treatments available. Beyond one specific treatment, I’ve found the team is very willing to work with me and track my progress, and provide access to all kinds of different innovative solutions. Even after receiving treatment, I plan to continue at this practice due to how easy they make it to be a patient.

reviews.name: places/ChIJu7TNLu4F9YgRh4RyxWCmS1o/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25aemJXTjZRVU5wYVhoZmFVVXRNMlpvWW1NM1lVRRAB
reviews.text:
It’s rare to find a practice where the medical care is this high-level and the customer experience is this consistent. Five stars without hesitation.

What I value most about the doctor is how he works with you. He has deep expertise in his specialty, but he doesn’t operate on autopilot—he listens, takes your goals seriously, and collaborates with you to build a plan that actually fits your body and your life. I never feel rushed or dismissed, and every recommendation comes with clear reasoning.

And the staff is phenomenal. Every person I interacted with was kind, fast, and on top of details—scheduling, questions, follow-ups, all handled smoothly. The combination of high-caliber medical care and genuinely excellent service is rare. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: places/ChIJu7TNLu4F9YgRh4RyxWCmS1o/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSTWRHTmpSbVUyYm10VllUZHVhRWxzY2w5VlVYYxAB
reviews.text: Dr Donahue is the best doctor in Atlanta.  He does my hormone replacement and runs very accurate testing for each appointment.  Ive been going to him for over 10 years.  My health is at its absolute best.  He really cares about his patients and provides the best care according to your situation.  He is a must see!

reviews.name: places/ChIJu7TNLu4F9YgRh4RyxWCmS1o/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25aSmFHOVRkbEZHT1RWT2RWSjZiR2xYU2xRMFoxRRAB
reviews.text: Bioidentical hormone therapy has turned out to be an excellent option versus the traditional big Pharma! Dr. DONOHUE does a great job with this. You may ask why I gave three stars instead of five and that is because of his staff. I really liked Dr. DONOHUE, but I chose to leave this practice and go to another office because of the staff. It always seemed like one part of the office did not know what was going on with the other part of the office, getting appointments were an issue, getting refills were an issue, getting a detailed bill or receipt was an issue And After your visit, another lady called about EVERY 30 minutes until you paid your bill for your virtual visit. For me, after four years of being a patient that was a little bit harassing since all my bills were always paid on time (just not 5 minutes after the visit) as busy as my life is, I need things to run much more smoothly.  Additionally, Dr. DONOHUE does not take insurance for the bioidentical hormone therapy, and for some that may be an inconvenience.

reviews.text: I've been extremely happy with the staff and Dr. Weldon. They have been very responsive, communicative, and I feel like they have really worked "with" me to come up with a plan specific for me. I've seen improvements exactly where I wanted to.

reviews.text: Dr. Donahue is extremely knowledgeable about hormone health.  He stays informed with the most up to date science that he shares with me during our visits on hormone health as well as overall preventive care. His staff are always responsive, kind and professional. Highly recommend!

reviews.text: I first became aware of hormone health from podcasts- and ever since then I’d been so curious about my own hormone levels! Lucky for me, my good friend became involved with Castle Rock Hormone Health who makes the evaluation and treatment process super easy and fun! Not only do I feel better (more energy, better metabolism, improved sleep, and much better sex drive), I also look forward to seeing my blood panel results and meeting with my doctor for follow up appointments (who is she?!). Feeling enthusiasm, confidence, trust in doctors, and excitement about my healthcare and future health is new for me…  I’m so so so grateful for this clinic

reviews.name: places/ChIJf9ZHFy8L9YgR8hYxe98WWOs/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNycUtxZ1Z3EAE
reviews.text:
I started treatment with Castle Rock after leaving one of their competitors because I did not like the quality of care that I was getting with them. The difference has been night as day. Not only am I sure where I am because of the much more regular bloodwork, but I can actually tell that the treatment is working since they have me on the correct dosage now.

What a difference a provider makes!

reviews.name: places/ChIJf9ZHFy8L9YgR8hYxe98WWOs/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURiak9xMXlBRRAB
reviews.text: Comfortable, warm, professional atmosphere with staff who are knowledgeable about hormone health,  and how diet and exercise can impact physical and mental health.  Caring staff who spend time answering questions and helping clients take charge of their health and their lives.  The owner, Chris, and his entire team of healthcare professionals really care about their clients and show this through actions and conversations consistently.  Excellent service and care.  Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJf9ZHFy8L9YgR8hYxe98WWOs/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyelBTemZREAE
reviews.text:
Man, I'm so happy I've decided to finally check my testosterone levels with Castle Rock Hormone Health Atlanta.  Fellas, you may not even feel, what you might consider,  typical symptoms of low T, or you might believe you feel normal "for a 40 year old", until you discover your test is low and let Castle Rock help get your levels back to where they were in your 20s and sustain in! I've been on my program for 5 weeks now and the difference is night and day. My sleep is better, my digestion is better, my workouts are better,  my sex is better, I have a more positive outlook on life, general mood has improved!  These are all the things you want!

The minute I stepped in the clinic the girls were friendly and professional.  In my normal personality,  I joked with the girls and they were totally receptive, so we had a good connection from the beginning, they answered all of my questions,  and drew my blood onsite (no going to concentra to wait in line for an hour, within a couple weeks I had a 1 on 1 video meeting with a doctor to go over my labs and discuss the best approach and BOOM! Before you know it my first shipment of prefilled doses arrived and at this point I don't think I'll Ever quit!

Also this is not just a clinic that helps males be the best version of ourselves but also females. Decline after 35 can be so gradual we think we're normal but you just don't know how much you've actually lost until you start a program that reminds you just how much you've lost. Castle Rock Hormone Health Atlanta is that program. Come see for yourself!

When I arrived I was met by the receptionist and He was very accommodating. Shortly one of the owners came to great me. 2026 is competitive, you have to be on point and so far they are, smiles and all. Danny was the best part of my experience. She is very professional and genuine with many other attributes. I hate needles and she assured me I was in good hands. The first nurse I have ever entitled my full and complete trust too. reviews.text:
Patrick is the absolute best support I could ask for and Renew has help me uncover and pursue my potential. I suffered from low T for years and no doctor would help. Renew got me on a program within a matter of weeks to help me balance my hormones and completely eliminate those empty lethargic feelings that come with chronically low T.
Patrick Ekey has been my contact throughout the process and has proved immensely knowledgeable and always makes time for my incessant questions.
Through Patrick and Renew's help I've been orders of magnitude more focused and energetic; I'm sheddimg fat and greedily adding lean muscle mass (from 165-205/210) in 20 weeks. I've always maintained near perfect training and a very well balanced diet, but never saw the results I felt I worked for. After getting hormones in balance I feel I'm making the right progress; my sex life has exploded with my partner (and tbf myself) - from once or twice a week to minimum 1 per day:excuse the oversharing but if I were you reading this review, these are the details I'd want to know.
This team personalized my treatment and I'm doing better than ever with them in my corner. I cannot recommend their protocols and process more highly.,

Personal note: thanks Patrick you the man with the plan and I'm looking forward to working with you long term.

reviews.text: This place is great and professional - the staff is polite treat you like family. I’ve been using this place - for over 2 years the have helped my military injuries. reviews.name: places/ChIJBYWu4H-T9YgRmwCHwcpjFSw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2paQlEzbFdZWFpNZVZaV1NGVTBkRTFUWDJSdWRXYxAB
reviews.text: They came recommended to me by a co-worker and she was right! The staff are all great and inviting. There's no culture of uncomfortable upselling for anything and any treatment you end up with, or don't, is explained in detail and why. My initial blood labs were worth that visit alone! Very eye opening and WELL worth the very affordable cost. I've recommended this place to several people already. I swear they don't pay me. They're awesome

reviews.name: places/ChIJBYWu4H-T9YgRmwCHwcpjFSw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25ORFFqSjBjbWhUZGtaVmRIZEtTMUJhZG5oVlNGRRAB
reviews.text:
The people at Infinite Athlete are absolutely incredible! From the moment you walk in, you’re greeted with genuine smiles and an atmosphere that makes you feel right at home. The staff truly care about every person who walks through the door — they take the time to get to know you, encourage you, and make sure you’re comfortable and confident in your goals.

It’s rare to find a place where everyone is so uplifting and positive. Whether you’re new or experienced, the team goes above and beyond to support your progress and celebrate your wins. You can tell they’re passionate about what they do and about helping others become the best version of themselves.

If you’re looking for a place filled with good energy, amazing people, and real results, Infinite Athlete is it!

reviews.text: I had a great experience at innovation Health Hormone Replacement! I received B12 to take home and NAD+ injections during my visit. Shonna was especially helpful—she took her time explaining the benefits of each injection and answered all my questions with patience and clarity. I left feeling confident and well taken care of. Highly recommend this clinic for anyone looking to boost their wellness the right way!

reviews.text:

The team is knowledgeable in each option they have for your case or preferences. Yes, every body is different, every treatment is taylor to your body’s necessities. They take the time to explain every detail of the steps to follow and also answer every doubt you can have, they hear you and always try to help you understand the process. All these is pivot with three beautiful ladys that just make you try everything to see if somewhere in the futuro can look like them, if the treatments make that magic :) on my experience I feel everything I have tried is being making the work.

The enviroment is neat, clear, detailed organized and peaceful, making you want to stay all day to be attended.

The prices are affordable, on my point of view health always deserves every penny.

Hope my experience and perspective helps you to make the best bet in your life here at Innovation health.

reviews.text: Absolutely worth it! Very responsive , scheduled me right away. I had just had surgery a week ago felt like I needed a boost of fluids. reviews.name: places/ChIJj5kmm2u47g0RQAJKhbkoxUg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT201RmNVbDNabE5LVW14MUxXVTJVV05pY2pCbWMxRRAB
reviews.text: We had such a great experience getting IVs a week or so ago. Ashley is the best, she put both mine and my husbands nerves (we don’t love needles) at ease and got our ivs going and set amazingly fast. We have had a busy holiday season and just wanted to get a little extra fluids and energy before Christmas is here. It was fantastic being able to literally sit on the sofa and watch tv while getting fluids. 10/10 recommend we will absolutely be doing this again soon and are even discussing joining the membership program!

reviews.name: places/ChIJj5kmm2u47g0RQAJKhbkoxUg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25SZlVWRllkbmhMVjFkcVFWWmljbHBsWVRkRE5IYxAB
reviews.text:
I was feeling so bad I couldn’t even make it the hospital.  I had gotten dehydrated during an illness giving me a pounding headache for days!  I found this company and called them.  They responded very quickly and THEY COME TO YOUR HOME…you don’t even have to leave!  They came out immediately.  The 2nd time I was able to get complete relief!
Brad was the EMT who came and gave me the IV.  He was very kind and knowledgeable… he was attentive and professional!
This company has texted me after each visit and checked on me!  I can’t say how pleased I am to have found them!
Best of all they offer a monthly plan to help me keep and maintain my health and wellness!
Check out their website…you’ll be as amazed as I was that this type of service is available…and their response times were great!
I am very impressed and have been telling everyone for days how great my experience was with them!
I’d highly recommend you contact them to find out the vast array of services they offer!
Thanks for taking care of me!

reviews.name: places/ChIJRfgotEnLjIgRtU_Asjz6lRU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfeHYyT1pnEAE
reviews.text: Regardless of your goals, a subscription of treatment includes regular blood labs to target and address deficiencies that will lead to better health and optimization. This can apply to numerous goals, and overall health, not just hormonal treatment. Rx protocols are just one offering, should you want to optimize a particular area of concern. Rx are reasonably and competitively priced with other clinics, but customer service and response time of Renew Vitality personnel is top tier; quick responses and personal care. Patrick was my point of contact and he regularly checked in on me. I felt like he cared about my overall well-being, not just trying to sell me on a host of supplements and prescriptions. Bringing their treatment into my life has had a greater impact on my sleep and vigor than any other recommend product or regimen touted online as a “must-try”.

reviews.name: places/ChIJWUkKvRCj9YgRWsrWIXF_MTU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCaHZpUkdBEAE
reviews.text:
I am a disable veteran with erectile dysfunction (E.D.) issues.

I decided to do something about it. So, I called Georgia Male Performance Clinic in Duluth.

After meeting and speaking with Dr. Daniels for approximately 45 minutes.

I gained some confidence and assurance.

He listened to my concerns. Then, explained  the root causes of (E.D.)

Dr. Daniels is a Navy veteran...very professional, knowledgeable, and genuine.

After my examination, he suggested a treatment plan.

Dr. Daniels assured me it would resolve my (E.D.) issues.

This new treatment is called GainsWave... Shockwave Therapy.

I received treatment the same day. Thanks to the office manager: Kyle he was friendly, cordial, and extremely helpful.

Michelle was exemplary. She offered excellent scheduling, and she's an expert in her job.

The visits and treatments have been a great experience and life changing.

My confidence and self esteem is remarkable!

I would highly recommend the  Georgia Male Performance Clinic in Duluth.

reviews.name: places/ChIJWUkKvRCj9YgRWsrWIXF_MTU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1aEwzVEVnEAE
reviews.text:
I can't speak highly enough about Georgia Male Performance.  After calling and talking with Kyle (the clinic manager), then going in, I found them all (Kyle, Michelle who does the treatments, and the Doctors) to be trustworthy, credible, personable, flexible and reasonable.  I felt very comfortable there and when going through the treatments. They were accommodating to meet the needs of my treatment, and I felt like they sincerely cared about me getting good results - more so than just making a buck!   I did a lot of research about what type of Focused Shock Wave Machines are the most effective and found they had the STORZ - CuraMedix Chattanooga Intelect F-SW which is one of the best to generate a true focused shockwave that more deeply targets improving blood flow.  I ended up getting several treatments with this machine and coupled that with the Acoustic Wave Machine as they both target different depths. The treatments were painless.   I also got the PRP shot as well which seemed to help as well.
BTW…  I called around to a few other places and many other places didn't have good reviews, were more expensive and less personal / accommodating.  I'd definitely recommend Georgia Male Performance.

reviews.text: I’m so incredibly disappointed. Samantha was tremendously helpful my first few visits but the last 2 times I needed prescriptions refilled it was impossible to reach anyone. I went to the office multiple times, messages on the portal, left voice messages and no response. My husband even went to the office asking that they call a prescription in and nothing. Now it’s the Friday before a holiday weekend with no way to have my prescription refilled. As a menopause specialist she should know how important the medication is to her patients.

reviews.name: places/ChIJh01MPgnV-YgRom2If-ff_lU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25WdlVtTlJNbGd5WkcweVNWbENkMHRMTW0xc1RtYxAB
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough wonderful things about Shannon! Since working with her, my migraines have completely disappeared—something I never thought I’d be able to say. She truly listens, digs deep to find the root of the problem, and creates a plan that feels sustainable and personalized.

Beyond that, she’s helping me gracefully step into my 40s with poise and confidence. I feel healthier, more balanced, and more supported than I ever have before. Shannon is caring, thorough, and genuinely invested in her patients’ well-being. I am so grateful for her guidance and highly recommend her to anyone looking for a functional doctor who goes above and beyond.

reviews.name: places/ChIJh01MPgnV-YgRom2If-ff_lU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tVd1dHMXVPRVJDYWtVeVMwbFJOMTlNY21OWWNFRRAB
reviews.text:
I have not had the same experience from the 1 star community. The only thing I can do is praise Shannon for what she has been able to do as far as helping me overcome a few of my health hurdles and concerns. I went from complete brain fog with forgetting words or not being able to finish sentences. I didn’t know I was that sick until I started to feel better. None of my primary Doctors, specialists, or hospital stays (several overnights and days spent trying to figure out what was going on) just to find out my hormones had bottomed out which I told them all to check!
Sometimes it takes a WOMAN when all the other MD’s & PHD’s won’t listen. 10 stars - would come here again….and again.

reviews.name: places/ChIJh01MPgnV-YgRom2If-ff_lU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRNTVUN1d3EAE
reviews.text: I'm not going to get into a long drawn out opinion of this business so in short I will say I have never gotten a call back from them although I have left many messages. I do not trust the billing or documentation. The red flag was trying to get a person on the phone just to make a new patient appt and never could get anyone to answer or a call back. I should have known better. I have worked in the medical office/clinic/hospital setting all my adult life and I know it can be very hectic at times BUT, you have to be organized! Excuses won't get the job done nor make happy patients/customers!

reviews.name: places/ChIJh01MPgnV-YgRom2If-ff_lU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s1R1RXRkdkMG93YTB4eVdVODJSV1JIZURSaVIyYxAB
reviews.text: Would not recommend this practice to anyone. The staff is incompetent especially Caroline who cannot seem to do anything she states she will do or do correctly.  Told insurance covers medications the policy does not cover under any circumstances like I stated on first visit after calling our two different insurance policies (husband was a patient too). Was falsely reassured the nurse practitioner she can get stuff approved with a preauthorization. Always blames others for their incompetence- phone service, laboratory, billing company, medical and prescription insurance company, pharmacy, fax machines, etc. Have an incorrect diagnose in my chart as well- that could have lethal implications. Refused to send my medication to my local pharmacy stating it had to be filled in GA- yet was sent there the first time and the next time sent to their pharmacy in North Augusta which is SC not GA). Refused to send the sleep study to the hospital I work at- only would send it to a company that wants the patient to pay cash and whose accuracy is questioned. Thyroid was run into the ground by changing me to a non FDA approved medication, worst labs in over 20 years. Came in to feel better. Instead wasted a ton of time, money, wrecked my health, and now have inaccurate stuff in an electronic medical record. Office does not even know that the term doctor and nurse are legally earned titles (both staff and nurse practitioners use these terms illegally). The medical assistants are illegally called nurses and the nurse practitioners doctors- one is a doctor of nursing practice. Board and insurance companies really need to investigate this office. Seemed to be more worried I was buying Zepbound from Lilly instead of their compounded non FDA approved medication. I refused to continue buying their nearly expired, already opened (sterile seal broken), and short filled vials (missing medication). The owner needs to wake up and realize the staff are destroying her practice and reputation. PCP and GYN told us to not return due to safety concerns regarding non FDA approved medication and illegal possible kick backs and a serious medical diagnosis error. Disappointed registered nurse who is sad others put profit over patient safety, well-being, and being ethical.

reviews.name: places/ChIJc9FoZ9HS-YgR5S14afjHI7c/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25aTU5raDNORkZvZWpsT2VsbFFUVkpuYVhvMmMzYxAB
reviews.text: For a year after my medically induced hysterectomy at 47, I didn’t feel like myself. I had put on 40 pounds of weight after losing 70 pounds of weight the year before when I was trying to get myself back into a healthy place in life my emotions were everywhere, I was hormonal, I was having hot flashes, joint pain, insomnia, fatigue, brain fog. And these are just some of the symptoms that I experienced out of so many I didn’t know what I could do to feel somewhat normal again. This was my new normal, and I was devastated at knowing that my doctors accepted this as part of growing older. I was angry and I wanted answers. I was recommended to see Dr. Tojino by a friend  and she took the time to listen to me and ordered labs that I had never even heard of after speaking to my primary care physician. I started hormone therapy and I can honestly say it was the best thing that ever happened to me. it gave me back some sense of normalcy. I can’t say that all my symptoms are gone, but they are definitely manageable. I am able to work out again I have lost 30 pounds of the 40 I have gained and continue to prioritize my health, my eating, and my workouts so that I can continue to live a healthy life in this new journey that I’m in. If you are going through this, don’t accept from your doctors that this is your new norm, you have options.  I’m glad that I advocated for myself and that I can now have some type of normalcy while in menopause. Thank you Dr. Tojino to you and your staff for all you do for me and other women going through the same obstacles in this stage of life.

reviews.text:
From the moment I walked into Gameday Men’s Health this morning, I knew this wasn’t going to be a typical medical experience. The entire team was welcoming, professional, and genuinely attentive. You’re not treated like a number here. You’re treated like a person.

What really stood out to me was how knowledgeable the staff is. They took the time to explain everything clearly, answered every question without rushing, and made sure I understood my options. You can tell they truly know their craft and care about getting it right.

The environment is clean, comfortable, and inviting. It feels more like a high-end lounge than a clinic, which makes a big difference. The whole process was smooth, organized, and efficient.

reviews.text:

I’ve been a customer at Gameday Men’s Health for a while now, and I can confidently say that it’s hands down one of the best experiences I’ve had with any healthcare service. From the moment you walk in, you're greeted with a warm and welcoming atmosphere. The staff truly go above and beyond to make sure you feel comfortable and cared for.
The customer service is top-notch—friendly, attentive, and professional at all times. They take the time to listen to your concerns and answer any questions you may have without making you feel rushed. It's clear that they are all experts in their field, but they also know how to make you feel like a priority.
What really sets Gameday Men’s Health apart, though, is the owner. This person is not just passionate about the services they provide, but also genuinely invested in the well-being of their clients. Their positive energy and commitment to excellence make you feel like you're in the best hands. It’s rare to find an owner who is so hands-on and engaged with the day-to-day operations while maintaining such a friendly and approachable vibe.
Whether you’re there for a consultation, treatment, or just to ask some questions, you can trust that Gameday Men’s Health will provide a fantastic experience. Highly recommend them to anyone looking for excellent service and a team that truly cares!

reviews.text: I've made a few decisions in my life that I can honestly say have been a huge impact, and this is one of them. I've been seeing Heath since roughly August of 25. In that time frame my life has changed so much for the better. It has allowed me to scale down on the amount of medications I've been being force fed over the years by doctors who just want to see you and send you out the door. He doesn't try to force anything on you, and actually listens to you and your concerns. I wish I would have done this so long ago!

reviews.name: places/ChIJhyLwbDi5-ogRnehfjwWRdm4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsYU5rWXhVVmR4UVZvNFlUZHdWbkJNTWs1dGFIYxAB
reviews.text: If you are looking for a knowledgeable professional, you’ll find it with Heath. After doing some research on my own, I still wasn’t able to get all my questions answered until I met with Heath and had a one on one conversation that was not rushed, but informative and helpful. He was able to give a straightforward explanation on the services offered and I left the consultation with a better feel for what I should expect. Heath listened to my concerns and what I had in mind for where I wanted to be health wise, added his expertise, and worked with getting me started on making sure I was on the right track. He was efficient and straight to the point. Highly recommended if you want top tier treatment and the ability to communicate with your provider absent a waiting room and a receptionist. When he says “concierge service,” he means it. Choose Southern Vitality, you won’t regret it.

reviews.name: places/ChIJhyLwbDi5-ogRnehfjwWRdm4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxdVJGTjJTVk0yUTI5aE4xSlFlRU01ZW1aNFFWRRAB

reviews.text: My husband’s hormone levels are healthy, yet this clinic has him taking injections to “boost his testosterone.” An outside nurse practitioner reviewed his labs and said he wasn’t even a good candidate for trt and is at high risk for a stroke. Irresponsible “medical professionals” promoting to vulnerable men. Do not recommend.

reviews.text: Balance Bodies is a a great place if your looking to lose weight especially if you have a big appetite. I myself usually gained weight from eating to much and the shots along with the great nutrition advice by the staff help a lot with getting your weight down. The facility is very clean and beautiful. Staff is very friendly and personable. They also are very knowledgeable with any questions you may have. Also a plus is it works well with your schedule. I only need to come in once a week or so for the shots and if you’re scared of shots like I am this one isn’t nearly that bad. The shot just feels like a tiny pinch but other than that this place is well deserving of a 5 star and I would recommend it to anyone looking to lose weight healthily.

The owner Jordan is such a down to earth and well rounded person and fun to talk to. Ariana welcomed me and made me fill right at home. She was very detailed in explaining the options and she left me with clear understanding. I would highly recommend this location, I promise you won’t regret it.

reviews.text: This clinic ROCKS!!  First, I normally don’t take the time to write reviews, but felt compelled to this time.  I was looking for a trusted place that does peptides since I just started my weight lifting journey. I called the clinic and Ariana, the front desk person and Jessica the nurse were so personable and kind -  I really really grilled them with lots of questions, but they weren’t fazed at all. The were extremely patient and even had the owner Mr Jordan answer more grilling questions I had lol.   I went in for my first appt and was immediately impressed again with the beautiful and calming vibe of the clinic. Ariana and Mr Jordan explained everything there is to know about my concern and made it a wonderful amazing experience. Hands down this clinic is def worth checking out that truly care about your goals!

reviews.text: Men's Medical prescribed and distributed latex bands for me to wear post-op. I am very allergic to latex which this group knew even before the procedure. reviews.text:
Exceptional Care and Results at Ageless Wellness Center!

I can’t say enough great things about Ageless Wellness Center and Dr. Walraven. She truly takes the time to listen and understand every concern, addressing health at its root cause rather than just treating symptoms. Her thorough and thoughtful approach to functional medicine sets her apart — she uses in-depth blood testing to uncover underlying imbalances and provides tailored hormonal interventions like BHRT that make a real difference.

I also appreciate that they don’t settle for “standard” ranges when evaluating things like thyroid levels — they focus on what’s optimal for your individual body. The entire team is knowledgeable, caring, and genuinely invested in your long-term wellness.

Whether you’re working on weight loss, hormone balance, or simply want to feel your best again, Ageless Wellness Center is the place to go. I’m so grateful to have found a clinic that looks at the whole picture and empowers patients to thrive!

reviews.text: My wife and I have seen Dr. Collins and his team for 6 years now. Consistently - as in EVERY patient consult - we have found him to be an outstanding professional. reviews.name: places/ChIJAZeyOaqm-4gRCXmrxdT6yVg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25OSVpITnpMVkZvVmpGTVoyY3pWSFozWVZoMVRuYxAB
reviews.text: First, I am the guy that does not go to doctors very often. Dislike when I do have to go! At 50 now I have noticed a huge decline in energy and just all around how I feel. After being encouraged to go just see what Savannah Age Management had to say after blood work, I reluctantly went. After 8 weeks of our partnership to recover the guy I used to be, I can say I wish I would have known 10 years ago that I could feel this good again! I would recommend them to anyone who is just feeling “their age” because you don’t have to. The investment in yourself is more than worth it! Great staff, support and follow up! Best experience I’ve ever had with health care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJAZeyOaqm-4gRCXmrxdT6yVg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21kblRIaExhR2N3YzFsTlFXWnBZVGxWVkRkSldtYxAB
reviews.text: I’ve been with Dr. Collins and the Savannah Age Management team for 9 years, and I can’t say enough good things about them. HRT has completely changed my life, and their guidance with weight loss has produced real, lasting results. I love the personalized approach and how they make me feel informed and in control of my health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJAZeyOaqm-4gRCXmrxdT6yVg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25OVGFsOVplbGRDTlVkcVFWZDJkM2hoTFVNek1IYxAB
reviews.text:
I’m a former patient of Savannah Age Management and I feel ethically obligated to warn others about their business model and treatment practices.

This clinic gatekeeps access to basic hormone therapy behind a $4,000+ paywall on boarding fee. From there, you’ll pay around $400/month for continued care—plus labs out of pocket and your own prescriptions/supplements. They advertise a full care team (dermatologist, nutritionist, physical therapist, etc.), but none of that materialized for me during my time there. What I received was one overworked employee doing everything Elaine—drawing blood, booking appointments, chasing payments, and handling prescriptions and doing the follow ups.

I was never seen by a doctor in person. I paid thousands and walked around thinking I had a physician managing my care—until I went to a real medical provider and realized I’d only ever seen a medical assistant. It was embarrassing.

When I transitioned to a new provider (appointment already scheduled), I asked for a short prescription grace period to avoid lapse in hormone care. They refused. Flat-out refused. No concern for my safety. No bridge care. Just cold policy.

If you’re thinking of joining this clinic, just know:
This is a cash-for-access model, not real integrative care.
They talk wellness, but treat patients like walking payment plans.
And once they release you? They’ll gatekeep your meds like it’s a power trip.

There are better, more ethical options out there. Don’t be fooled.

reviews.text:
Exceptional Care and Outstanding Laboratory Services

From the moment you walk in, the staff is professional, welcoming, and genuinely committed to your long-term health and well-being.

The medical team is extremely knowledgeable and takes the time to listen, explain results thoroughly, and develop individualized treatment plans focused on prevention, vitality, and overall wellness. Their approach to anti-aging and chelation therapy is both evidence-based and patient-centered, which inspires a great deal of confidence.

A special mention must be given to the laboratory personnel, who are simply the best. They are highly skilled, efficient, and incredibly kind. Blood draws and lab work are handled with precision and care, making the process quick, comfortable, and stress-free. Their attention to detail and professionalism significantly enhance the overall experience and ensure accurate, reliable results.

This clinic goes above and beyond in every aspect—from advanced treatments to exceptional lab services and compassionate care. I highly recommend Preventive Medicine Anti-Aging & Chelation Therapy to anyone seeking proactive, high-quality healthcare in the Fort Oglethorpe area

reviews.name: places/ChIJXZBta3NmYIgRdD8MzRR-xrk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25CeVZqUmliSGxSTFRRM2NsOTVRbWwwVFhoclZtYxAB
reviews.text:
I am not usually the person to post reviews. However, If I can save your marriage like it has saved mine along with prayer, I want to do that.
My husband started going here first we were both getting older and wanted to look and feel better.
I was very against going at first. I did not want to spend the money. It had been a difficult year. But I finally agreed to go.
Let me tell you I am so glad that I did. See I had already gone to my Gynecologist and she just wanted to put me on another antidepressant. What I asked her to help me with was my libido. Not sure if you are aware but that does just
the opposite it makes you have no libido. Okay so now I am going to get to the part where they helped me. I started receiving the HRT(hormone replacement therapy). Let me just say in about three rounds of the hormone pellets I have been back to my 22 year old self. It not only completely changed my libido.  I have never wanted my husband the way I do now. I am more confident, enjoy going out with my husband. I had stopped wanting to do anything. I could continue on with all the things it has changed for me but the number 1 thing I asked them for was to improve my libido to save my marriage. Wow! They more than delivered on that. Now my husband has the headache(hahaha). Seriously we have been married for 26 years and I am wonderfully enjoying  my marriage like it is suppose to be. Not just the libido but we go out together, we talk, oh and we laugh together again.  If you’re trying to improve how you feel and your marriage or just improve your libido please please go see The Doctors at Preventive Medicine.  They have helped save my marriage and reading the Bible will help as well. Intimacy is important in your marriage.
If you read all of this thank you now make the appointment. God  bless you!

reviews.name: places/ChIJXZBta3NmYIgRdD8MzRR-xrk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxdmVrTk1WMmMyVFdSMGVVbDVWVm90TlMxNlUwRRAB
reviews.text:
In October of 2024 through May 2025, I was very ill and had become bed ridden. I had issues with swallowing and couldn't breathe freely due to sinuses being so inflamed. My own doctors were sending me to several specialists and testing but couldn't resolve or understand what was happening.

I spoke with Dr. Alexandra and she scheduled some blood test, and then made a plan of action which led me to a path of healing. I'm so grateful to be well again, able to breathe freely and swallow normally. Thank you! 😊

reviews.text:
I recently had an outstanding experience at Optimize U in Roswell, GA, thanks to Hillary Maloney, PA-C. From the moment I walked in, the atmosphere was welcoming and professional, setting the stage for an informative appointment.

During our meeting, Hillary took the time to thoroughly discuss my lab results, ensuring I understood every detail. Her expertise and ability to explain complex concepts in an accessible way reassured me that I was in capable hands. We also developed a personalized health plan moving forward, which includes peptide therapy. I was impressed by her comprehensive approach, focusing on both my immediate needs and long-term wellness goals.

Hillary's genuine care for her patients is evident, and I left feeling empowered and motivated to take charge of my health. I highly recommend Optimize U to anyone looking for a supportive and knowledgeable team to assist them on their wellness journey! Five stars all the way! 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

I could not be more satisfied with the attention to care that they give and the benefits of my hormones. I encourage anyone to seek help from and trust them with your health needs.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ8SMiw1Fz9YgR4kwO3TrHMto/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEMWNPRFJ3EAE
reviews.text:
CORRECTION - this review was for the original business, CryoStretch, not for the current business, Optimize U.  Thank you.

**********************************************************

It's typically rare for me to come across a business I highly recommend. CryoStretch in Roswell is one of a select few.

I stumbled across this place while walking through a shopping center near my house. I visited their website and thought that I'd give them a try. Boy am I glad I did.

I started with their Basic membership with Stretching , which included 3 recovery services per month + 3 NormaTec sessions (Whole Body Cryotherapy, Local Cryotherapy, Assisted Stretching, Infrared Sauna, NormaTec).

After completing my first month, I was hooked and decided to upgrade to their Unlimited membership w/ Stretching, which includes Each service once EVERY DAY.

There are many local athletes who benefit from these services but it's also great for an average Joe like me, because I was looking for a way to reduce stress and improve my overall health.

The Assisted Stretching almost feels like a mini workout because my muscles are stretched much further than I could do on my own. I've also noticed a slight increase in muscle definition.

The NormaTec recovery equipment is super relaxing and it helps me bounce back from my occasional workout faster. It's actually sometimes challenging to stay awake while your legs are receiving a mini massage.

They offer full-body and localized cryotherapy which can decrease pain and inflammation to optimize your performance. For me, this has become one of my favorite parts.

First, I won't lie. The Whole Body Cryotherapy is freezing cold at 140 degrees below zero or even colder. At first, it felt like the longest 3 minutes of my life, but now I actually look forward to it. Afterwards I usually feel refreshed, relaxed and almost energized.

While there are so many services to choose from, the best part is the staff.  Christy, the owner, is professional and always supportive.  The rest of the team, including AJ, Kristin, Tracey, Julie, Kelli, Rachel, and others, provide personalized services for ongoing wellness and improved health.

So, whether you are an athlete or an average Joe like me who sits in front of a computer all day, I definitely suggest trying CryoStretch in Roswell.

Cheers

They even gave me a free cryotherapy session on top of that. When it came time to talk about their services, It wasn't a sales pitch. It was an informed recommendation. 10/10 experience. Thank you

reviews.name: places/ChIJSQtRJ1zH9IgRfWakmVLlwEg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205d1gyZEVXbmhKWkZsRGJuWmlWbWRuYTJwMVEyYxAB
reviews.text: I went to Alive Functional Wellness in January of this year, frustrated and tired of feeling sick and having no energy. I was having digestive issues, skin issues, hormone issues, and I was exhausted all the time. Yvonne was patient and caring. She spent over an hour with me my first visit and really listened to me in a way that I finally felt heard and seen. All other doctors I had been to just tried to medicate the symptoms and send me on my way, but not Yvonne. She wanted to get to the root issues. Through labs and testing, we found I was deficient in B vitamins, iron, and progesterone, and that I had a ton of inflammation in my digestive tract. Using supplements and diet, I’m well on my way to healing. I’ve lost 12 lbs just by focusing on my gut health and choosing anti-inflammatory foods. I have so much more energy and feel so much better! I am so glad I made the choice to see Yvonne for help.

reviews.name: places/ChIJSQtRJ1zH9IgRfWakmVLlwEg/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBaHBYd0lBEAE
reviews.text:
Yvonne is amazing! She has extensive knowledge and understanding of how the body works, and how to help it function in the best way possible. She investigates thoroughly to find the root cause of outward symptoms and starts the healing process there. She also takes time to explain and break things down in a way that is understandable, empowering through education.

She truly cares, it’s clear that she actually wants to help each person to achieve physical healing and optimal health. You can tell that she loves what she does and that people aren’t dollar signs to her. She makes me feel valued, seen, and heard, something I’ve never found in any other medical professional. I cannot recommend her enough!

reviews.name: places/ChIJSQtRJ1zH9IgRfWakmVLlwEg/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBaS02MzJ3RRAB
reviews.text:
Yvonne has been crucial to me and my health journey over the last year.  I have struggled with pcos, endometriosis and overall hormone imbalance for 25+years and have had a recent hysterectomy. She has helped me to naturally recover and balance my hormones to help get me relief. So thankful for her support and understanding. She goes above and beyond, I am thankful to have a practitioner who listens and cares so deeply for my family and I.

Thank you Alive!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJSQtRJ1zH9IgRfWakmVLlwEg/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5Nm9Hazh3RRAB
reviews.text: I went to see Yvonne, of Alive Functional Wellness, when I was at rock bottom health-wise and had nearly given up hope that my body could heal and that I could enjoy life again. I had been seeing a popular local gastro and was getting no where. I’d also been spending money on natural remedies online trying to self medicate but without really knowing what was causing all of my gut-related issues. Yvonne took the time to really listen to me and my problems and ran comprehensive tests that really shed light on my struggles. She helped me implement a step-by-step plan that I’m happy to say has given me so much of my life back. I am living joyfully and gratefully thanks to Yvonne’s expertise and her heart. I recommend her for anyone struggling with ongoing symptoms that the medical community has failed to help with!

reviews.name: places/ChIJSQtRJ1zH9IgRfWakmVLlwEg/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5M2NtUUVnEAE
reviews.text: Yvonne Conaway is an absolute gem!  I have struggled with chronic illness for years and, after seeing various doctors and receiving little answers, I began to doubt if I would ever receive the help I needed. I was then connected to Yvonne through a mutual friend and she immediately offered to help me. The thing I have liked best about being treated by her is that she has listened and offered her professional advice but allowed me to lead on what decisions I believe are best for me. Honestly, she is a Godsend and I couldn’t recommend her enough!

reviews.text: Elevation Men’s Health is hands down one of the best clinics I’ve been to. The team is welcoming, respectful, and genuinely cares about your health and results. I’m very happy with my experience and would definitely recommend them.

reviews.name: places/ChIJXTY35KBH-ogRbnf69VJSKwo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xOTmIyRTRSV1JPVWtGS1REWkpWRXhqTjJjM01FRRAB
reviews.text: I came in 2 years ago today the staff took my blood and got me back the results. After reviewing my results they were very helpful in explaining to me what I could do to improve my overall health. They also provided me with the correct supplements to get my hormones in line. Here we are two years later and I feel great!! When I can make the time to actually get in the gym the workout just feels different than before. Also it seems like it is easier to loose weight and stay in shape. Overall the staff is amazing and they have helped me to feel and look way better.

reviews.name: places/ChIJXTY35KBH-ogRbnf69VJSKwo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t4V1FVZFlhamhGV0hoNE5HZHJhMEZNUjJGVlgzYxAB
reviews.text: Karen and Kody are great.  I've been seeing treatment for about a year now and its nice to feel like I'm more than just a numbered patient. When my lab results had anomalies on them, Karen has gone beyond the TRT treatment to make sure that the anomalies were corrected.  I wish I had started this treatment sooner - do yourself a favor and just call them for the consultation and initial tests.  You'll be amazed at how your quality of daily life can be improved.

reviews.name: places/ChIJWxDQyqdX9IgRftv9ZpWpoAY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xrNVJIVTJaamRHUmtKaGFGcE1kalZ3VFVJNFNuYxAB
reviews.text:
I made an appointment over a month ago. When making the appointment I tried to provide my insurance plan and was cut off by the phone staff and told "don't need it, we accept Anthem." Now, today, when I showed up, I was told they don't accept that plan, in fact. Very frustrating, and you'd think when this doctor is my primary physician, they would let you know if a new policy is no longer accepted. And they should've ABSOLUTELY checked when I made the appointment, especially if there are plans with Anthem that they don't accept!
Now, rather than having been treated after waiting a month, I have to start over with a new doctor search.

reviews.name: places/ChIJWxDQyqdX9IgRftv9ZpWpoAY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2poNk1DMVBVSEUxU1VaTVdVeEljRGRsYjBOSmRuYxAB
reviews.text:
I’ve had a very disappointing experience at this doctor’s office. I was dealing with a thyroid issue, and after months of getting my levels checked, the doctor finally told me she had prescribed medication six months earlier but “forgot to update the system.” During that time, my symptoms got worse, hair loss, fatigue, and overall not feeling well.
When I tried to ask follow-up questions during visits, she would literally back out of the room while I was still speaking. The medical assistants were also unprofessional, rude, and struggled with basic tasks like drawing blood.
Overall, I never felt cared for or listened to, just like a number. I would not recommend this office.

reviews.name: places/ChIJWxDQyqdX9IgRftv9ZpWpoAY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2twUGJWWk5jV3BpY2pKWlowTnNZMFZMVmpKUFRVRRAB
reviews.text: I cannot say enough great things about Dr. Sylvain and her team. From the very first visit, they have gone above and beyond to make sure I feel heard, cared for, and supported. Dr. Sylvain takes the time to truly listen to my concerns, explains things in a way I can understand, and never makes me feel rushed. They follow up after appointments, help coordinate referrals, and even call to inform me of normal lab results. It’s rare to find a physician who combines such professionalism, knowledge, and genuine compassion. I am so grateful to have a primary care doctor who truly goes the extra mile for their patients.

reviews.name: places/ChIJWxDQyqdX9IgRftv9ZpWpoAY/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQa0xUX1dREAE
reviews.text: My first visit here and I was seen on time! front & checkout desk and were friendly. My Np Iris was the best. She listened, addressed all my concerns and I felt seen and heard. She was very compassionate and I look forward to wellness under her care. The facility is nice and clean. I recommend that you check this place out for yourself, but book in advance.

reviews.name: places/ChIJWxDQyqdX9IgRftv9ZpWpoAY/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqb2ViRVBnEAE
reviews.text: I had an appointment today at Eagles Landing Longevity Center. At check-in, I was surprised to learn of a $65 no-call no-show fee. While I understand the importance of enforcing policy, I was taken aback when told I couldn't be seen without paying it along with my co-pay. Despite explaining my situation and my 8-year history with the practice, the rigidity around the fee was unexpected. I drove 45 minutes for this appointment, hoping to address some lab results, but felt my concerns weren't heard. I'm concerned about the level of care and compassion and have decided not to return. I hope this feedback prompts the office to balance policy enforcement with compassion and understanding. They may want to reconsider their approach to patient care.

I recently decided to move forward with TRT treatment after months of research. The initial company I contacted online was very unorganized and unprofessional, which made me pause.

I then reached out to Game Day Men's Health, and I am so glad I did. From the first phone call, the entire team was positive, upbeat, and clearly focused on helping me. reviews.name: places/ChIJ_4z8dcuZ9YgRIGVvgUfGsTA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21WRmFtTTVZVWMxU2pCNFVXOVJhakJ5YzBneGRYYxAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough great things about GameDay Men’s Health. From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel comfortable and welcomed. They are professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely care about your health and well-being. Everything is explained clearly, and they take the time to answer questions without rushing you.

The facility is modern, clean, and designed to put you at ease—it feels more like a high-end wellness clinic than a doctor’s office. Scheduling is flexible, and they make the whole process smooth and stress-free.

Most importantly, the results have been life-changing. Their personalized approach really works, and I’ve noticed a huge improvement in both my energy and confidence. They don’t push unnecessary treatments; instead, they focus on what’s best for you.

If you’re considering men’s health services, I highly recommend GameDay. They truly set the standard for professionalism, care, and results.

Her adjustments are nothing short of amazing - I leave each session feeling a world of difference in my overall well-being. What truly sets Sarah apart is her exceptional bedside manner. She offers a wide range of holistic approaches to help balance your health and make you feel your absolute best. Whether it’s nutrition advice, exercises, or other wellness strategies, she’s a true holistic health expert. In my opinion, Sarah isn’t just the best chiropractor in her field; she’s a dedicated and caring healthcare professional who has made a remarkable difference in my life. I wholeheartedly recommend her to anyone seeking top-notch chiropractic care and comprehensive wellness support.

reviews.text:

reviews.text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

I can't recommend Men’s Health Athens enough! From the moment I walked in, Gabby and her staff made me feel welcome and valued. Their approach to hormone optimization is thorough and personalized; they took the time to truly understand my needs and crafted a tailored plan just for me.

Gabby's communication has been exceptional—always prompt, clear, and supportive. I truly appreciate how diligently she checks in on my progress without any pressure to buy into unnecessary treatments. Their primary focus is on my health and longevity, which is incredibly reassuring as a husband and father.

If you’re a man looking to improve your hormonal health, I highly suggest reaching out to Men’s Health Athen.

reviews.text: They were phenomenal answered all of my questions give me true insight on where I was and where I need to be and came up with a wonderful plan. I highly recommend them five stars isn’t enough. Go game day!

reviews.name: places/ChIJq6uuQzFr9YgRBzarPs3Hims/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21GRlpVMXdRVk4xYWpoaGR5MTRWMVkyUlZobmRtYxAB
reviews.text:
I wanted to write a review of Gameday because I am a female.  When I first heard of them I thought it was only for men, then I was told females can benefit from their services too!

They have many things to offer, not just testosterone (which women lose as well), but can help with weight loss, B-12 injections, and even hair loss. If you are looking for assistance in these areas, what do you have to lose, the testing is free – certainly can’t beat that!

So, I scheduled a visit.  I noticed  their staff and PA were very friendly and welcoming.  The clinic is clean, and modern and doesn’t feel like your typical medical office.

The PA took the time to listen to my concerns and explain my options.  They answered my questions and took their time with me. They talked through the process, cost and what I results I might expect. The treatment plan  felt personalized, not a “one-size-fits-all.”  I’ve only been on it couple of weeks, but I have already noticed a positive difference in my energy, and sleep pattern.

If you’re looking for a place that can help you in a variety of ways, and genuinely care for their patients, I’d definitely recommend checking them out. They make what could be an intimidating process feel straightforward and supportive.

reviews.name: places/ChIJq6uuQzFr9YgRBzarPs3Hims/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT200eVYwVlFZVnBMUjNGeVRuVlhSSFF3TkVKSGNuYxAB
reviews.text:
Gameday Men’s Health is on another level.

From the moment you walk in, everything feels professional, efficient, and genuinely focused on men’s health. The staff is knowledgeable, welcoming, and actually takes the time to explain what’s going on instead of rushing you through like a number.

The clinic itself is clean, modern, and comfortable. Appointments are streamlined, labs are quick, and the results and treatment plans are explained clearly and honestly. No pressure, no gimmicks, just real solutions backed by data.

What really stands out is how dialed-in they are to performance, energy, and overall well-being. Whether it’s optimizing hormones, improving recovery, or just feeling like yourself again, they treat the whole picture, not just a lab number.

If you’re serious about your health, longevity, and performance, Gameday Men’s Health is absolutely worth it. This is how men’s healthcare should be done.

reviews.text: My experience with Gameday was nothing but stellar.  From their professionalism to their knowledge and understanding. reviews.text:
Mike has been my physician for almost 7 years now. I’ve seen his practice go from almost no patients to so many that he couldn’t keep up because he took on too many new patients.

COVID hit and most of his employees left. He was forced to rehire and ever since then the office staff has been absolutely terrible. The only person who’s stuck around is Jack and he is miserable. His quality of care has completely gone downhill!!

Dr. Skardasis now wants to charge his patients a $2,400 per year membership fee to see him!!! 😡 If you don’t pay for his membership, you’ll be forced to see his nurse practitioner. Talk about being up on yourself!! I don’t care if the “membership” fee is $5 bucks a month…it’s just ridiculous!!! Needless to say, I’ll be finding another doctor who ACTUALLY cares about patients instead of just the money in his pocket!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJr_7Hqydr9YgRTJin2g6zH2I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25STVZITjVSVE4zYzNWWGVIWklaUzFvYjFobk1IYxAB
reviews.text: Dr. Skardasis has transitioned his practice to a concierge model, requiring patients to pay significant membership fees in addition to insurance billing. While this change is presented as a benefit to patients, it is apparent that the primary outcome is financial gain for the physician with less patient load. For many, especially those on fixed incomes or Medicare, this creates barriers to care rather than improvements. Patients should be aware that continued access now requires substantial out‑of‑pocket costs.
